overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit covered pedestrian walkway transitioning into a dark industrial waste facility with a burning incinerator and maintenance corridors. The environment features futuristic urban architecture with green and yellow neon lighting giving way to fire-lit industrial metal walkways.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway with a distinctive green illuminated ceiling. Concrete benches line both sides, and a tall vertical 'NICOLA' billboard stands prominently on the right. The camera walks forward through this neon-lit arcade, passing scattered pedestrians, and begins ascending stairs at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza leading to industrial security gate

events.description: warm orange glow from burning incinerator becomes visible ahead
passing through metal security gate into industrial waste facility

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the industrial security checkpoint into the waste area

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the trash piles on the left side

entered.detail: large metal gate structure with mesh fencing
yellow warning sign with black text reading NO ENTRY
large piles of blue and green garbage bags stacked against the wall
industrial waste burner with visible flames and smoke

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a transitional plaza leading to an industrial facility. A prominent 'NO ENTRY' sign hangs above a metal security gate. As the camera approaches, the warm glow of a burning incinerator becomes visible in the distance. The camera passes through the gate into the industrial area where trash piles line the walls and a worker stands near the garbage heaps.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with ventilation systems

events.description: turning right to navigate around the burning incinerator structure
moving away from fire source into darker corridor section

agents.ego_description: navigating past the burning waste pit and into the dark maintenance tunnels

entered.detail: thick industrial ventilation pipes painted red running along the corridor
elevated metal grating walkway with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the industrial facility, passing the burning incinerator which illuminates the area with flickering orange light. The floor transitions to metal grating. Turning right around the fire pit, the camera enters a darker maintenance corridor dominated by large red ventilation pipes. The lighting shifts from the warm fire glow to dim artificial lights as the camera progresses through the narrow industrial tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban pedestrian arcade into the depths of a dark, fire-lit industrial waste facility. It begins by walking through a covered walkway under a green illuminated ceiling, passing concrete benches and a tall Nicola billboard before ascending a set of stairs. As the camera exits the arcade, the scene opens into a transitional plaza where it passes under a no entry sign and through a security gate, moving toward the distant warm glow of a burning incinerator. The environment then shifts into a gritty industrial zone filled with trash piles and metal grating, with the flickering orange light of the fire pit illuminating the path. Finally, the camera turns away from the flames to enter a dim maintenance corridor, where the lighting fades into artificial shadows among large red ventilation pipes.
